reasoning: Loom is a data-dense LLM compilation pipeline and knowledge management dashboard. It requires authority, clarity, and a function-first design. The Swiss archetype provides an objective, rigid, and structural layout where color is used purely to guide action, avoiding decorative distraction.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous internal padding for cards to avoid collision. Dense grid layout for dashboards to correlate data.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content. Optical alignment over geometric.

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px delicate inner stroke border-zinc-200, shadow-sm.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders/Technical Look: Flat background, 1px subtle border border-zinc-200, no shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-md, border-zinc-300.
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat solid: Sharp inner contrasts, primary color bg, white text. No soft shadows.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Explicitly set text color on hover. Slight lift for interactive cards.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast ring focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-2

component_instructions.general: Use Shadcn/UI for tables, calendars, dropdowns, dialogs, cards, tabs. Keep aesthetics structural and card edges sharp (max 6px).
component_instructions.knowledge_graph: Use 'react-force-graph-2d' or 'react-force-graph-3d' for the concept relation network. Implement progressive disclosure: start with a simplified view, use a hybrid layout with the main graph canvas taking up majority space, and a right-side sliding detail panel for node inspection.
component_instructions.markdown_wiki: Use 'react-markdown' with 'remark-gfm'. Style typography elegantly with Tailwind Typography (prose prose-zinc) but override link colors to use the primary #002FA7.
component_instructions.charts: Use Shadcn chart components (Recharts) for task queue stats, success/failure rates, and token usage metrics.
component_instructions.tables: Dense rows for pipeline monitoring (Task Queue). Explicit status badges.

login_background.description: Abstract blue and white round geometric pattern. Use as a decorative sidebar or background element on the Login page.

empty_state_graph.description: Abstract lines and graphs. Use for empty states of the knowledge graph or pipeline dashboard.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Tinted greys must remain accessible.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-article-btn').

localization.instruction: All UI copy, placeholders, menus, and tooltips MUST be in Simplified Chinese (zh-CN).

instructions_to_main_agent: Scaffold the React/Tailwind frontend project if it does not already exist.
Install 'react-force-graph-2d' (preferred for readable text nodes) for the Knowledge Graph Visualizer.
Install 'react-markdown' and 'remark-gfm' for the Wiki Knowledge Base Browser.
Implement Shadcn/UI for tables, buttons, inputs, tabs, and charts.
Ensure the UI uses the Swiss High-Contrast aesthetic: heavily structural, rigid grids, 1px borders, white/zinc background, with International Klein Blue (#002FA7) strictly for actions.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the pipeline monitoring dashboard.
For the knowledge graph, implement a hybrid layout: main canvas on the left/center, right-side sliding detail panel for node inspection.
Ensure all text is in zh-CN (Chinese) as per user choice.
Implement JWT-based Login (small team multi-user) using the provided geometry image for the auth split-screen background.
